name: delivery-team
summary: Default project work pattern separating planning, implementation, and review.

roles.name: architect-planner
roles.responsibility: Clarify scope, constraints, interfaces, and acceptance criteria before implementation.
roles.stop_condition: The work is decision-complete enough for a builder to execute.

roles.name: builder-implementer
roles.responsibility: Make the scoped code, config, or doc changes while staying inside the plan.
roles.stop_condition: The scoped work is complete and locally verified as far as practical.

roles.name: reviewer-tester
roles.responsibility: Review changes for regressions, risk, and missing tests or verification.
roles.stop_condition: The changes are either approved or concrete findings are documented.
